task_description: Redesign the online lobby to support a host creating/configuring a game (player count, available clans, decks) and other players joining by game ID, selecting from available clans shown as visual badges (clan-colored border, 20x20px seal, name). When all clans are taken the game auto-starts. Real-time updates across all clients.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with zero TypeScript errors. All changes compile cleanly.
